programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A former Army intelligence officer steals millions through a fake veterans' charity.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A man sets his sights on strip clubs, real estate, Iraqi currency, diamonds and even mind control technology.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Russian gangsters use beautiful women to seduce amorous men in nightclubs out of their money and jewelry.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A 28-year-old hacker named Daniel Rigmaiden allegedly steals millions of dollars from the U.S. government; a wise-guy wannabe, in witness protection creates a mortgage fraud scam.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A Michigan doctor treats cancer-free patients with poisonous chemotherapy and takes millions in payment; two Chicago-area bank robbers repel 17 stories to escape the Metropolitan Correctional Center.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Police Lt. Joe Gliniewicz steals from a youth group and his death in the woods in Fox Lake, Ill., sparks a massive manhunt to find his killers.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Polka band leader Jan Lewan rips off his adoring fans with false promises of sizable investment returns.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Florida teenagers cash in on the opioid crisis, then they expand their operation, jeopardizing their lives of sex, drugs and money.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Three Miami salesmen import billions of dollars' worth of gold from South America; they then learn that it has connections to drug cartels and organized crime.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A dynamic pricing tool; a revolutionary cleaning tool; a wine product; an update on Biz Swap.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Guest shark Kevin Hart; a fun tool that takes snacking to the next level; a product made from space-age materials; an online social network that allows fans to have a real connection with their favorite celebrities and influencers.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A unique tool for carving pumpkins; a foldable 2-in-1 fitness product; a new version of a traditional Korean dish; a sculpting play set designed for children.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Good American CEO Emma Grede guest Sharks; an artisanal vegan cheese company; emergency underwear; a suitcase designed for wine bottles; an alternative to the traditional bra.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A line of flatware, cups and plates that allows hands-free eating; an air-tight, self-sealing zip-top bag made of silicone; an improvement on nap time; non-toxic, super hydrophobic spray.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Bake-at-home, all-natural treats; a beauty product made specifically for women with curly hair; a unique twist on yoga with help from a surprising source; a product for showering in public with privacy; Alli Webb guest judges.
